Off Calendar May-17-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-09-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Stephen P. Brunner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Land rover Financial Services, a unit of BMW Financial Seervices NA, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the defaulted Defendants: Antonio C. White and Digital Deli, Inc. as follows:
Damages $15,080.20
Attorney's Fees $11,340.00
Costs $1,231.60 for a total of 27,651.80, and possession of the 200 Land Rover Rang Rover 4.6HSE, sport utility vehicle, VIN #SALPV1644YA438621.
Judgment signed in open court.
